name: iot-monitoring-system
description: IoT Monitoring System with Backend & Frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" && echo. && echo =========================================== && echo Frontend: http://localhost:3000 && echo Backend:  http://localhost:5000 && echo ===========================================
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
